negative_variants.description: Rail Ramp Rate Startup Monitor: asserts readiness from thresholded rail validity without ramp-rate or settling qualification.
Rail Ramp Rate Startup Monitor: releases startup_ready as soon as the rail crosses vready.
Rail Ramp Rate Startup Monitor: ignores the active-high enable input.
Rail Ramp Rate Startup Monitor: treats only undervoltage as a rail fault.
Rail Ramp Rate Startup Monitor: reports slew_metric from absolute supply level instead of sampled rail movement.
